incident_details.short_description: Credit Limit field missing from Account Form
incident_details.description: After the last sprint deployment, the 'Credit Limit' field has disappeared from the Main Account form for all users.

resolution.root_cause: The field was accidentally removed from the form in the Development environment, and the change was captured in the solution exported to Production.
resolution_steps: Verified that the field still exists in the system but is missing from the form layout.
Opened the Form Editor in the Development environment.
Re-added the 'Credit Limit' field to the 'Financials' section of the form.
Exported a hotfix solution and imported it into Production.
Published the form and verified the field is visible.
